tasks.subject: Add speed & turn stats to Session panel
tasks.description:
Add to Session panel:
1. Tokens/sec — calculate output tokens per second based on turn durations
2. Average turn duration — track each turn's duration and show avg

Need to:
- Track turn start/end times in index.ts (turn_start / turn_end events)
- Calculate avg turn duration and tokens/sec
- Pass these to SessionSnapshot
- Display in session.ts panel

tasks.subject: Add context usage warning when approaching limit
tasks.description:
Add context usage warning system:
1. When context usage exceeds 80%, flash a notification/warning to the user
2. Different severity levels: 80% = warning (yellow), 90% = critical (red)
3. Only notify once per threshold crossing (don't spam)
4. Use ctx.ui.notify() for the alert
5. Add visual indicator in the Info panel context bar (e.g. ⚠️ prefix when high)

tasks.subject: Add SYSTEM panel with RAM, CPU, GPU stats
tasks.description:
Create new SYSTEM panel showing:
1. RAM usage (used/total, percentage) — use Node.js os.totalmem()/os.freemem()
2. CPU usage (percentage) — calculate from os.cpus() delta between ticks
3. GPU usage (if nvidia-smi available) — shell out to nvidia-smi
Create extensions/system.ts, register in PANEL_DEFS, add to buildAllPanels layout
